name: competitor-alternatives
description: When the user wants to create competitor comparison or alternative pages for SEO and sales enablement. Also use when the user mentions 'alternative page,' 'vs page,' 'competitor comparison,' 'comparison page,' '[Product] vs [Product],' '[Product] alternative,' or 'competitive landing pages.' Covers four formats: singular alternative, plural alternatives, you vs competitor, and competitor vs competitor. Emphasizes deep research, modular content architecture, and varied section types beyond featur
author: TheCraigHewitt
summary_zh: 帮你快速搭建竞品对比和替代页面，专为SEO引流与销售转化设计。当你需要制作“A vs B”或“某某替代品”这类落地页时非常适用。
